games.title: Mario Kart World
games.description: Mario Kart World is the flagship Switch 2 launch title featuring an open-world design with 24-player races, new driving mechanics, and a vast interconnected world to explore between courses.

games.title: Donkey Kong Bananza
games.description: Donkey Kong Bananza is a 3D platformer developed by the Super Mario Odyssey team where DK and Pauline explore underground layers, using DK's destructive strength to mine through terrain and uncover hidden secrets.

games.title: Pokémon Legends: Z-A – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition
games.description: Pokémon Legends: Z-A takes place entirely in Lumiose City featuring real-time battles with Mega Evolution, set in a future Kalos where urban redevelopment plans create conflict. The Switch 2 Edition offers 4K docked resolution and stable 60fps.

games.title: Kirby Air Riders
games.description: Kirby Air Riders is a Switch 2 exclusive racing game featuring Kirby riding Air Ride Machines across chaotic courses, serving as a spiritual successor to the GameCube classic with enhanced multiplayer modes.

games.title: Metroid Prime 4: Beyond
games.description: Metroid Prime 4: Beyond is the long-awaited fourth entry in the first-person Metroid Prime series developed by Retro Studios, sending Samus Aran on a new mission to a remote planet. The Switch 2 version features a Quality Mode (4K/60fps) and Performance Mode (1080p/120fps).

games.title: Animal Crossing: New Horizons – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition
games.description: Animal Crossing: New Horizons – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition enhances the beloved island life game with 4K resolution, Joy-Con 2 mouse controls, up to 12-player online sessions, and new Ver. 3.0 content including a resort hotel and expanded island storage.

games.title: Dynasty Warriors: Origins
games.description: Dynasty Warriors: Origins is the latest entry in Koei Tecmo's long-running musou series, taking place in the turbulent Three Kingdoms era with a new storyline following a wandering warrior across massive battlefields.

games.title: Final Fantasy VII Remake Intergrade
games.description: Final Fantasy VII Remake Intergrade brings the award-winning reimagining of FFVII's Midgar arc to Switch 2, featuring the base game plus the INTERmission DLC chapter starring Yuffie, with a new Streamlined Progression mode.

games.title: Dragon Quest VII Reimagined
games.remake_original_title: Dragon Quest VII: Fragments of the Forgotten Past
games.description: Dragon Quest VII Reimagined is a thorough remake of the classic RPG with diorama-style visuals, streamlined storytelling, and updated gameplay mechanics that make the longest Dragon Quest adventure more accessible than ever.

games.title: Mario Tennis Fever
games.description: Mario Tennis Fever is the first Mario sports title for Switch 2 featuring 38 playable characters and 30 unique Fever Rackets with special abilities, offering the largest roster in the series' history.

games.title: Yakuza Kiwami 3 & Dark Ties
games.description: Yakuza Kiwami 3 & Dark Ties brings the remastered Yakuza 3 to Switch 2 alongside a brand-new story DLC featuring Kiryu's old enemies from the Dojima Family and new protagonists in Kamurocho.

games.title: Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition
games.description: Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition upgrades the fan-favorite open-world RPG with 60fps, new QoL features, and Switch 2 enhancements, building on the already-excellent Definitive Edition released for Switch 1.

games.title: Fallout 4: Anniversary Edition
games.description: Fallout 4: Anniversary Edition brings Bethesda's post-apocalyptic open-world RPG to Switch 2 with all DLC included, featuring enhanced resolution and performance compared to the original Switch version.

games.title: Balatro
games.description: Balatro is the acclaimed poker-themed roguelike deck builder where players bend the rules of poker to create powerful synergies, now available on Switch 2 with enhanced features and smooth handheld play.

games.title: Resident Evil Requiem
games.description: Resident Evil Requiem is the latest original entry in the franchise, starring Leon Kennedy and new co-protagonist Grace Ashcroft as they investigate a terrifying new biological threat, combining the visceral horror of early RE with the action of RE4.

games.title: Blue Prince
games.description: Blue Prince is a unique puzzle-exploration game set in an ever-changing manor house where players must find Room 46 before the day ends, with each run generating different room layouts and deepening an intricate narrative mystery.

games.title: Scott Pilgrim EX
games.description: Scott Pilgrim EX is an enhanced version of the beloved beat 'em up based on Bryan Lee O'Malley's graphic novels, featuring new content, updated graphics, and expanded multiplayer modes for up to four players.

games.title: Pokémon Pokopia
games.description: Pokémon Pokopia is a life simulation game where players control a Ditto disguised as a human, building a cozy utopia from an empty world and inviting Pokémon friends to live there, with seasonal events and online multiplayer.

games.title: Fatal Frame II: Crimson Butterfly Remake
games.description: Fatal Frame II: Crimson Butterfly Remake is a full remake of the classic PS2 horror game, following twin sisters Mio and Mayu who become trapped in a ghost-filled village, with modernized gameplay and visuals while preserving the original's haunting atmosphere.

games.title: Tomb Raider I-III Remastered
games.description: Tomb Raider I-III Remastered brings all three classic Lara Croft adventures to Switch 2 with modernized graphics, updated controls, and quality-of-life improvements while letting players toggle between classic and modern visuals.

games.title: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection
games.description: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection is the third entry in Capcom's Monster Hunter RPG spin-off series, following Rider Eleanor as she battles a shadow version of herself in a world where twin Rathalos born from fate upend the balance between humans and monsters.

games.title: WWE 2K26
games.description: WWE 2K26 brings the full wrestling simulation experience to Switch 2 with CM Punk on the cover, featuring new motion-based control options using the Joy-Con 2, an expanded roster, and enhanced MyRISE career mode.

games.title: Kena: Bridge of Spirits
games.description: Kena: Bridge of Spirits brings Ember Lab's visually stunning action-adventure game to Switch 2, following young spirit guide Kena as she navigates a beautiful forest filled with lost spirits and corrupted creatures.

games.title: Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition
games.description: Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds is a kart racer featuring Sonic and characters from across the Sega universe, with cross-dimensional tracks and gameplay mechanics that blend high-speed Sonic action with traditional kart racing.

games.title: Super Mario Bros. Wonder – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Meetup in Bellabel Park
games.description: Super Mario Bros. Wonder – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition enhances the award-winning 2D platformer with 4K resolution and Switch 2 features, bundled with the new Meetup in Bellabel Park content that adds fresh multiplayer gathering activities.

games.title: South of Midnight: Weaver's Edition
games.description: South of Midnight: Weaver's Edition brings Compulsion Games' acclaimed deep-South American folklore action-adventure to Switch 2, following Hazel as she discovers magical powers while navigating a world of Southern Gothic mythology.

games.title: PRAGMATA
games.description: PRAGMATA is Capcom's long-awaited sci-fi action game set on a near-future moon base, following a seasoned astronaut and a mysterious girl as they navigate a dystopian world filled with advanced technology and danger.

games.title: Mixtape
games.description: Mixtape is an Xbox Game Studios narrative action game set in the 1990s where two friends go on an unforgettable road trip soundtracked by classic music, blending coming-of-age storytelling with action sequences.

games.title: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle
games.description: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle is MachineGames' acclaimed action-adventure game starring Indy as he unravels a globe-spanning mystery involving the Great Circle, a series of landmarks hiding an ancient secret. The Switch 2 version ships on a full physical game card.

games.title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book
games.description: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book is a Switch 2 exclusive platformer where Yoshi helps a magical talking book named Mr. E rediscover the creatures living in his pages, exploring colorful habitats and uncovering surprising facts about each creature.

games.title: Bubsy 4D
games.description: Bubsy 4D is a surprise revival of Accolade's 90s mascot platformer character, reimagined as a modern 3D platformer with a self-aware, comedic tone that leans into the character's notorious legacy.

games.title: Tales of Arise: Beyond the Dawn Edition
games.description: Tales of Arise: Beyond the Dawn Edition brings Bandai Namco's acclaimed JRPG and its expansion DLC to Switch 2, following the story of Alphen and Shionne as they continue their journey beyond the events of the main game.

games.title: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth
games.description: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth is the epic second chapter in the FF7 Remake trilogy, following Cloud and companions beyond Midgar across a vast reimagining of the original game's world, packed with over 100 hours of content and 125+ perfect scores worldwide.

games.title: to a T
games.description: to a T is Keita Takahashi's (Noby Noby Boy) absurdist narrative adventure game about a teenager whose arm is stuck in a T-pose, navigating daily life and relationships in a charmingly weird coming-of-age story.

games.title: The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales
games.description: The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales is a new action-adventure RPG exclusive to Switch 2, featuring a richly detailed world and a sweeping story spanning multiple generations of heroes.

games.title: Deltarune (Complete)
games.description: Deltarune is Toby Fox's anticipated follow-up to Undertale, with Chapter 5 completing the game's story on June 24, 2026, featuring Kris, Susie, and Ralsei in a chapter-based RPG adventure with the pacifist/genocide route mechanics the series is known for.

games.title: Star Fox
games.description: Star Fox is a surprise Switch 2 exclusive revival of Nintendo's classic space combat franchise, following Fox McCloud and his team across a new story combining on-rails shooter segments with new gameplay styles, priced as a budget-friendly exclusive.

games.title: Rhythm Heaven Groove
games.description: Rhythm Heaven Groove ends a decade-long drought for the beloved rhythm game series, featuring dozens of quirky rhythm mini-games set to catchy original music, available on both Switch 1 and Switch 2.

games.title: Splatoon Raiders
games.description: Splatoon Raiders pivots the traditionally multiplayer-first shooter into a robust single-player and four-player co-op experience, with a dedicated Direct presentation revealing the full scope of the new Switch 2 exclusive.

games.title: Orbitals
games.description: Orbitals is an anime-style cooperative adventure game inspired by 1980s animation, with an It Takes Two-style cooperative design featuring multiple game modes, playable locally or via GameShare, exclusively for Switch 2.

games.title: Onimusha: Way of the Sword
games.description: Onimusha: Way of the Sword is a long-awaited revival of Capcom's samurai action franchise, confirmed at Nintendo Direct June 2026 for September 25 release, featuring intense swordplay set in feudal Japan.

games.title: Rayman: Legends Retold
games.description: Rayman: Legends Retold is a remake of the acclaimed 2013 platformer, featuring updated visuals, four new musical stages, and local four-player co-op, coming exclusively to Switch 2 on October 1, 2026.

games.title: Kingdom Hearts Collection [I~III]
games.description: Kingdom Hearts Collection [I~III] brings the complete main trilogy of Square Enix and Disney's beloved action RPG series to Nintendo Switch 2, compiling Kingdom Hearts I, II, and III for the first time on a Nintendo platform.

games.title: 007 First Light
games.description: 007 First Light is IO Interactive's reimagined origin story of James Bond, starring Patrick Gibson as a young Bond with Lenny Kravitz as the villain, blending stealth, gadgets, car chases, and globe-trotting action. The Switch 2 version was delayed from the May 27, 2026 multi-platform launch to Summer 2026.

games.title: Borderlands 4
games.description: Borderlands 4 is 2K Games' next entry in the acclaimed cel-shaded looter-shooter franchise, featuring billions of procedurally generated weapons, irreverent humor, and co-op gameplay on a new planet.

games.title: DRAGON QUEST I & II HD-2D Remake
games.description: DRAGON QUEST I & II HD-2D Remake brings the first two Dragon Quest games to life with Square Enix's stunning HD-2D visual style, following the successful Dragon Quest III HD-2D Remake, completing the Erdrick Trilogy.

games.title: Dynasty Warriors 3: Complete Edition Remastered
games.description: Dynasty Warriors 3: Complete Edition Remastered brings back the fan-favorite classic musou game with modern visuals and expanded content, including all of the original game's officers and battlefields.

games.title: Elden Ring: Tarnished Edition
games.description: Elden Ring: Tarnished Edition brings FromSoftware's open-world masterpiece to Switch 2 as a complete package including all DLC content, letting players explore the Lands Between on Nintendo hardware.

games.title: Fire Emblem: Fortune's Weave
games.description: Fire Emblem: Fortune's Weave is the newest entry in Nintendo's acclaimed tactical RPG series for Switch 2, featuring a new cast of characters navigating a world shaped by fate and prophecy with classic turn-based strategy.

games.title: Hyrule Warriors: Age of Imprisonment
games.description: Hyrule Warriors: Age of Imprisonment is a Switch 2 exclusive musou spinoff set in the world of Tears of the Kingdom, following characters during the imprisonment arc with large-scale battles across Hyrule.

games.title: Lies of P: Complete Edition
games.description: Lies of P: Complete Edition brings the acclaimed dark Pinocchio-inspired Souls-like to Switch 2 with all DLC content included, featuring tight combat and a rich narrative set in the dystopian city of Krat.

games.title: Professor Layton and the New World of Steam
games.description: Professor Layton and the New World of Steam is the long-awaited new entry in Level-5's beloved puzzle-adventure series, following a young Layton as he and a new partner solve mysteries in a Steampunk-era setting.

games.title: The Duskbloods
games.description: The Duskbloods is an exclusive Switch 2 multiplayer action RPG from FromSoftware set in a dark fantasy world, featuring online network multiplayer with a closed network test scheduled for Summer 2026 ahead of its 2026 release.

games.title: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered
games.description: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered brings Bethesda's beloved fantasy RPG to Switch 2 with fully rebuilt visuals, expanded content, and modernized gameplay while preserving the original's iconic open-world adventure in Cyrodiil.

games.title: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time
games.remake_original_title: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time
games.description: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time returns reborn exclusively for Nintendo Switch 2, a full remake of the legendary N64 classic confirmed at Nintendo Direct June 2026 for release later in 2026.

games.title: Xenoblade Genesis
games.description: Xenoblade Genesis is a newly announced Xenoblade Chronicles title revealed at Nintendo Direct June 2026, expanding the beloved JRPG franchise with a new story and world for Nintendo Switch 2.
